- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Performance]: Major performance & clean-code pass â€” (1) Created `LazyVideo` component (`src/components/ui/LazyVideo.tsx`) with IntersectionObserver-based lazy loading and auto-pause for off-screen videos; (2) Replaced all non-hero `<video>` elements with `LazyVideo` to defer ~103 MB of video downloads; (3) Switched all `<img>` tags to `next/image` with AVIF/WebP format support, quality caps, and proper `sizes` hints for approach grid, showcase, impact hero, heart members (~54 MB of PNGs), program placeholders, and testimonial avatars; (4) Removed redundant Google Fonts CSS `@import` (already loaded via `next/font/google`); (5) Removed artificial 500 ms delays from all three service functions (`getArticles`, `getPrograms`, `getImpactStats`); (6) Updated `next.config.ts` with image optimization config (AVIF/WebP, remote patterns for Pexels/Unsplash, 30-day cache TTL), compression, and static asset cache headers; (7) Downscaled external Pexels video URLs from UHD 2560Ă—1440 to 720p; (8) Added CSS `contain: layout style paint` on `[data-scroll-section]` and `content-visibility: auto` on `.dark-bottom` for rendering performance; (9) Extracted inline data arrays (HEART_MEMBERS, SCROLL_TEXT_BLOCKS, PROGRAM_CARDS, TESTIMONIAL_AVATARS) from 1353-line `HomeClient.tsx` into `home.content.ts` reducing component to ~1220 lines; (10) Fixed `info.mp4` â†’ `Info.mp4` filename casing bug that would 404 on Linux/Vercel. Build passes cleanly with zero errors or warnings. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [Commonwealth Lab/Marketplace UI]: Implemented complete Commonwealth Lab Marketplace UI with dummy data for presentation â€” (1) Created `Product` model (`src/lib/models/Product.ts`) with `Product` interface, `CartItem` interface, `ProductCategory` type, and `PRODUCT_CATEGORIES` array; (2) Added 16 dummy products across 4 categories (Traditional Clothing, Handicrafts, Cultural Goods, PSZ Merchandise) in `src/data/products.ts` with Unsplash placeholder images; (3) Built product service layer (`src/lib/services/getProducts.ts`) with `getProducts`, `getProductBySlug`, `getFeaturedProducts`; (4) Created `CartContext` (`src/features/commonwealth-lab/context/CartContext.tsx`) with React Context API for client-side cart state (add/remove/update/clear, computed totals); (5) Built 9 reusable components: `ProductCard`, `ProductGrid`, `ProductGallery`, `CategoryFilter`, `QuantitySelector`, `CartItem`, `CartSummary`, `MarketplaceHero`, `ProductDetailClient`; (6) Implemented 5 page routes under `/commonwealth-lab/`: landing page (hero, featured products, category grid, CTA), product listing (search, category filter, sort, pagination with Suspense boundary), product detail with `generateStaticParams`/`generateMetadata`, cart page, checkout page with form and payment selector; (7) Integrated "Commonwealth Lab" nav link into `site.ts` and updated `Navbar.tsx` slice range; (8) Luxury/premium design with gold (#C4A265) accents, elegant typography, hover animations, and responsive layouts; (9) All product images use `next/image` with proper sizing; (10) Also resolved merge conflict markers across 9 files from prior rebase (home.content.ts, HomeClient.tsx, getArticles.ts, getPrograms.ts, getImpactStats.ts, next.config.ts, globals.css, context.instructions.md, package-lock.json). Build passes cleanly with 36 static pages generated. (COPILOT_LOG)
